arts.ttl: FC Twente set to sign USMNT winger Taylor Booth from Utrecht in €2m deal
arts.sum: According to ESPN, Utrecht forward Taylor Booth is on the verge of completing a permanent move to FC Twente. The 23-year-old United States international has already agreed a three-and-a-half-year deal…

arts.ttl: Preview: Heracles vs. FC Utrecht - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's KNVB Beker clash between Heracles and FC Utrecht, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
